mapper.select: SELECT /* lgsMgmtMapper.getDbSysDate */ TO_CHAR(SYSDATE + #{value},'YYYYMMDD') AS value FROM DUAL
SELECT /* lgsMgmtMapper.getInvtSrl */ FN_GET_LGS_BIZ_ID(#{value}) AS value FROM DUAL

SELECT /* lgsMgmtMapper.getIntmAmtInfo */ PRDT_ID AS prdtId /* 제품ID */ , OLD_YN AS oldYn /* 중고여부 */ -- , IN_UNIT_PRIC AS inUnitPric /* 입고단가 */ , OUT_UNIT_PRIC AS outUnitPric /* 출고단가 */ FROM CMN_INTM_MDL MDL , CMN_HNDST_AMT CMA WHERE MDL.RPRS_PRDT_ID = CMA.RPRS_PRDT_ID AND MDL.PRDT_ID = #{prdtId} AND CMA.OLD_YN = #{oldYn} AND CMA.UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND CMA.UNIT_PRIC_APPL_DTTM <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')
mapper.update: UPDATE /* lgsMgmtMapper.updateLgsOtcpSrlMst */ LGS_OTCP_SRL_MST SET CHNG_DTTM = SYSDATE --수정일시 , IN_ORGN_ID = #{inOrgnId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --입고조직ID , OUT_ORGN_ID = #{outOrgnId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --출고조직ID , LOGIS_PROC_STAT_CD = #{logisProcStatCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --물류처리상태코드 , PRDT_STAT_CD = #{prdtStatCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --물류상태코드 , SVC_CT_NUM = #{svcCtNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --서비스계약번호 , SVC_OPEN_DT = #{svcOpenDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --서비스오픈일자 , SVC_OPEN_TM = #{svcOpenTm, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --서비스오픈시간 , SVC_PROC_STAT_CD = #{svcProcStatCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --서비스처리상태코드 , IF_QUE_NUM = #{ifQueNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --인터페이스번호 , SLS_DT = #{slsDt,jdbcType=VARCHAR} , CAN_DT = #{canDt,jdbcType=VARCHAR} , IMEI = #{imei,jdbcType=VARCHAR} , WIFI_MAC_ID = #{wifiMacId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} , CHNG_ID = #{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --변경자ID WHERE PRDT_ID = #{prdtId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND PRDT_SRL_NUM = #{prdtSrlNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert: /* lgsMgmtMapper.insertInvtrDayMst */ INSERT INTO LGS_INVTR_DAY_MST ( ORGN_ID /* 조직ID */ , STD_DT /* 기준일자 */ , PRDT_ID /* 제품ID */ , OLD_YN /* 중고여부 */ , GOOD_STRG_INVTR_QNTY /* 양품창고재고수량 */ , NG_STRG_INVTR_QNTY /* 불량창고재고수량 */ , IN_DUE_QNTY /* 입고예정수량 */ , OUT_RSV_QNTY /* 출고예약수량 */ , REGST_ID /* 등록자ID */ , REG_DTTM /* 등록일시 */ ) VALUES ( #{orgnId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 조직ID */ , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') /* 기준일자 */ , #{prdtId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 제품ID */ , #{oldYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 중고여부 */ , #{goodStrgInvtrQnty, jdbcType=NUMERIC} /* 양품창고재고수량 */ , #{ngStrgInvtrQnty, jdbcType=NUMERIC} /* 불량창고재고수량 */ , #{inDueQnty, jdbcType=NUMERIC} /* 입고예정수량 */ , #{outRsvQnty, jdbcType=NUMERIC} /* 출고예약수량 */ , #{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 등록자ID */ , SYSDATE /* 등록일시 */ )

INSERT /* lgsMgmtMapper.insertPrdtSnapshot */ INTO LGS_PRDT_SRL_MST_HST ( HST_DTTM , PRDT_ID , PRDT_SRL_NUM , OLD_YN , ORGN_ID , IMEI , PRDT_SRL_NUM_FMT , PRDT_PRPOS_CD , LAST_INOUT_ID , PRDT_STAT_CD , SUPLY_CPNY_ORD_NUM , LAST_CHNG_HST_NUM , LOGIS_PROC_STAT_CD , MYCPNY_REQ_YN , PRDT_COLR_CD , SVC_PROC_STAT_CD , INPUT_DT , PRDT_TYPE_CD , CRE_DT , WIFI_MAC_ID , SVC_CT_NUM , SVC_OPEN_DT , SVC_OPEN_TM , ESN , CERT_KEY , TCN_STD_CNFM_CERTNO , WIBRO_IMEI , FIXED_ID , RFNO , NAMING , NSN , WIBRO_MAC_ID , INVTR_DAY_CNT , IN_UNIT_PRICE , IN_DT , OUT_DT , OUT_UNIT_PRICE , REGST_ID , REG_DTTM , CHNG_ID , CHNG_DTTM , RPRS_PRDT_ID , PD_ORGN_ID , SUPLY_MNFCT_ID , IF_QUE_NUM , SLS_DT , CAN_DT ) SELECT SYSDATE , PRDT_ID , PRDT_SRL_NUM , OLD_YN , ORGN_ID , IMEI , PRDT_SRL_NUM_FMT , PRDT_PRPOS_CD , LAST_INOUT_ID , PRDT_STAT_CD , SUPLY_CPNY_ORD_NUM , LAST_CHNG_HST_NUM , LOGIS_PROC_STAT_CD , MYCPNY_REQ_YN , PRDT_COLR_CD , SVC_PROC_STAT_CD , INPUT_DT , PRDT_TYPE_CD , CRE_DT , WIFI_MAC_ID , SVC_CT_NUM , SVC_OPEN_DT , SVC_OPEN_TM , ESN , CERT_KEY , TCN_STD_CNFM_CERTNO , WIBRO_IMEI , FIXED_ID , RFNO , NAMING , NSN , WIBRO_MAC_ID , INVTR_DAY_CNT , IN_UNIT_PRICE , IN_DT , OUT_DT , OUT_UNIT_PRICE , REGST_ID , REG_DTTM , CHNG_ID , CHNG_DTTM , RPRS_PRDT_ID , PD_ORGN_ID , SUPLY_MNFCT_ID , IF_QUE_NUM , SLS_DT , CAN_DT FROM LGS_PRDT_SRL_MST WHERE PRDT_ID = #{prdtId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND PRDT_SRL_NUM = #{prdtSrlNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
